decisionBoundary: This public-safe manifest separates proof buckets. It does not create buyer evidence, production deploy approval, Supabase advisor clearance, or launch-ready status.

items.label: Last approved production artifact
items.command: pnpm run check:post-deploy-live
items.evidenceBoundary: Only proves the deployed artifact checked during the latest approved deploy; it does not prove production parity for future source commits, which require an approved deploy and another live parity run.
items.nextAction: Rerun after every approved production deploy before calling live parity current.

items.label: Current source live parity
items.command: pnpm run report:production-approval-packet && pnpm run check:post-deploy-live
items.evidenceBoundary: Current source does not prove production parity from local checks, CI, launch evidence validation, or the last approved artifact; it requires clean provenance, launch evidence validation, explicit owner approval, guarded deploy, and post-deploy live parity.
items.nextAction: Clear source provenance, keep launch evidence validation passing, request explicit owner approval, deploy through the guarded production path, then rerun post-deploy live checks.

items.label: Current source release gate
items.command: pnpm run check:release-readiness && gh run list --repo sanjabh11/canada-energy-dashboard --limit 5
items.evidenceBoundary: Local, launch-evidence, and CI checks must be refreshed for the current SHA; a source check does not prove production deploy parity.
items.nextAction: Run source, launch-evidence, and CI checks before any approval packet or release request.

items.label: Source provenance and dirty-worktree gate
items.command: pnpm run report:production-approval-packet -- --skip-release-readiness
items.evidenceBoundary: Deploy requests require clean main-branch source provenance. The local packet classifies dirty paths by staged-only, unstaged-only, mixed, untracked, or ignored state, but this public manifest does not prove current local cleanliness or production approval.
items.nextAction: Rerun the approval packet, resolve any staged-only or unstaged source blockers, then run the full release gate before any production deploy request.

items.label: Source provenance isolation ledger
items.command: pnpm run report:production-approval-packet -- --skip-release-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The source provenance isolation ledger classifies dirty source paths by tracked, untracked, ignored, staged-only, unstaged-only, mixed, rename or move, and release-blocking state, but it does not commit, unstage, stash, revert, delete, rename, move, clear source provenance, run release-readiness, deploy, or grant approval. It does not prove current local cleanliness or production approval.
items.nextAction: Use the ledger to isolate owner-decision rows, keep unrelated user work untouched, and rerun the approval packet plus launch manifest only after explicit owner intent resolves every release-blocking source row.

items.label: Launch evidence validation gate
items.command: pnpm run check:launch-evidence-manifest && pnpm run report:production-approval-packet
items.evidenceBoundary: Launch evidence validation checks manifest structure and proof-boundary consistency only; it does not prove production approval, buyer acceptance, commercial readiness, deployment, or current hosted/live parity.
items.nextAction: Keep check:launch-evidence-manifest passing before any deploy request, then use the production approval packet to verify source provenance, release readiness, and owner approval gates.

items.label: Source provenance resolution queue
items.command: pnpm run report:production-approval-packet -- --skip-release-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The source provenance resolution queue classifies staged-only, unstaged-only, mixed, untracked, ignored, and renamed source decisions, but it does not commit, unstage, stash, revert, delete, rename, move, or clear source provenance. It does not prove current local cleanliness or grant production approval.
items.nextAction: Use the queue to identify owner decisions, keep unrelated user work untouched, and rerun the approval packet only after explicit owner intent resolves every source-provenance row.

items.label: Release preflight remediation queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The release preflight remediation queue sequences Corepack pnpm resolver, release-readiness execution, Git LFS push-path proof, clean source provenance, and explicit owner production approval, but it does not install tools, clear source provenance, run release-readiness, push, or deploy. It does not prove production approval.
items.nextAction: Expose Corepack and Git LFS in the release shell, clean source provenance through explicit owner decisions, then rerun the guarded release-readiness path before any deploy approval request.

items.label: Release preflight clearance matrix
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The release preflight clearance matrix maps package-manager pin, Corepack pnpm resolver, release-readiness execution, Git LFS push-path proof, clean source provenance, and explicit owner production approval, but it does not install tools, clear source provenance, run release-readiness, push, deploy, or grant owner approval. It does not prove production approval or current hosted/live parity.
items.nextAction: Use the matrix to keep release-blocking rows visible; fix Corepack and Git LFS in the release shell, resolve source provenance through explicit owner decisions, and rerun guarded release-readiness before any deploy approval request.

items.label: Release toolchain probe ledger
items.command: pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The release toolchain probe ledger records current-shell Corepack pnpm resolver and Git LFS availability evidence, but it does not install tools, run release-readiness, push, deploy, clear source provenance, or grant production approval. It does not substitute for release-readiness or production approval.
items.nextAction: Rerun the launch evidence manifest without --skip-probes in the intended release shell, fix Corepack or Git LFS PATH gaps, and keep release-readiness blocked until the guarded chain passes.

items.label: Launch blocker action queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The launch blocker action queue sequences source provenance, launch evidence validation, release toolchain, branch review, Supabase advisor access, buyer evidence, production approval, and post-deploy live proof, but it does not deploy, merge, contact buyers, mutate branches, clear blockers, prove launch evidence validation, or create launch readiness; it does not create launch readiness.
items.nextAction: Work the queue in order, keep source provenance, launch evidence validation, and approval gates first-class, then rerun the commercial launch readiness report and launch evidence manifest.

items.label: Production approval prerequisite queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The production approval prerequisite queue sequences clean source provenance, launch evidence validation, Corepack release-readiness, canonical branch review, Supabase advisor clearance, buyer evidence, explicit owner approval, and post-deploy live proof, but it does not prove production approval, deploy, push, merge, mutate branches, contact buyers, access Supabase, clear source provenance, prove launch evidence validation, or claim post-deploy live parity.
items.nextAction: Clear source provenance, keep launch evidence validation passing, clear every prerequisite row, request explicit owner approval only after the queue is ready, then rerun the launch evidence manifest and production approval packet.

items.label: Production approval request packet
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest && pnpm run check:production-deploy-request
items.evidenceBoundary: The production approval request packet classifies prerequisite rows into pre-request, owner-decision, and post-deploy-boundary phases, but it does not prove production approval, deploy, push, merge, mutate branches, contact buyers, access Supabase, clear source provenance, request owner approval, or prove hosted/live parity.
items.nextAction: Keep the request packet ineligible while any pre-request row is blocked; rerun check:production-deploy-request only after source provenance, launch evidence validation, release-readiness, branch review, Supabase advisor clearance, and buyer evidence gates are ready.

items.label: Post-deploy live proof gate queue
items.command: pnpm run report:commercial-launch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The post-deploy live proof gate queue sequences production approval clearance, guarded deploy completion, live public metadata, live static dist parity, hosted proof-pack route smoke, and current-source hosted parity claim, but it does not prove current hosted/live parity, deploy, push, rebuild, mutate Netlify, access live accounts, or run browser smoke.
items.nextAction: Use it only after explicit owner approval and the guarded deploy path; current-source hosted parity is not claimable until pnpm run check:post-deploy-live passes.

items.label: Unmerged branch review queue
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: High-risk unmerged branches are review queues; current launch evidence carries review-first packet summaries and canonical-head state, but this does not create launch evidence, buyer proof, production approval, merges, checkouts, migrations, or deploys.
items.nextAction: Review the review-first packets, choose canonical heads for split families, complete security and release checks, and merge only through normal release gates.

items.label: Branch clearance matrix
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The branch clearance matrix maps read-only branch review rows, review-first families, canonical-head decisions, stale or aging drift review, and release-gate dependencies, but it does not checkout, merge, push, discard, select canonical heads, run migrations, deploy, grant production approval, or clear branch review. It does not create launch evidence or prove production approval.
items.nextAction: Use the matrix to keep branch blockers visible; run focused read-only branch packets, record canonical-head owner decisions, and rerun release gates before any merge, push, discard, migration, deploy, or production approval discussion.

items.label: Canonical head decision queue
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The canonical head decision queue surfaces split, local-only, origin-only, stale, aging, and unknown branch-family decisions before merge review, but it does not checkout, merge, push, discard, deploy, or select a branch head. It does not create launch evidence or prove production approval.
items.nextAction: Use the ledger to choose canonical heads explicitly before any focused branch review, then rerun unmerged-branch readiness without checkout, merge, push, discard, migration, or deploy.

items.label: Canonical head resolution queue
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The canonical head resolution queue maps owner-decision actions for split, local-only, origin-only, stale, aging, and unknown branch-family states, but it does not checkout, merge, push, discard, delete, select canonical heads, migrate, deploy, grant production approval, or clear branch review. It does not create launch evidence or prove production approval.
items.nextAction: Use the queue to record explicit owner decisions for canonical branch heads, rerun focused read-only branch review, and keep every merge, push, discard, migration, deploy, or production approval decision behind release gates.

items.label: Review-first branch packet queue
items.command: pnpm run report:unmerged-branch-readiness -- --focus-risk high && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The review-first branch packet queue surfaces focused read-only branch packets, canonical-head state, changed Supabase function rows, and drift risk before any branch decision, but it does not checkout, merge, push, discard, migrate, deploy, mutate Supabase, or select a canonical head. It does not create buyer proof or create production approval.
items.nextAction: Run focused read-only packets for review-first families, inspect changed Supabase function rows, and keep every merge or deploy decision behind explicit owner approval and release gates.

items.label: Buyer evidence 95% gate
items.command: pnpm run validate:pilot-evidence -- path/to/register.csv --require-95 --evidence-root path/to/redacted-artifacts
items.evidenceBoundary: No buyer-proven market confidence without accepted buyer rows, reviewer evidence, commercial signal, and retained artifact hashes.
items.nextAction: Collect real anonymized buyer evidence and keep rehearsal rows at confidence_delta=0.

items.label: Buyer evidence acquisition matrix
items.command: pnpm run report:buyer-evidence-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The buyer evidence acquisition matrix maps outreach intake, production pilot register, utility forecast, TIER or credit, billing or security, distinct proof-pack, accepted confidence, reviewer, retained artifact, and 95% validation rows, but it does not contact buyers, create accepted evidence, move confidence, attach artifacts, validate 95%, or claim buyer acceptance. It does not create buyer proof or prove commercial readiness.
items.nextAction: Use the matrix to collect the missing buyer-supplied rows, reviewer notes, retained redacted artifacts, and 95% validation inputs before changing buyer confidence or launch claims.

items.label: Buyer evidence remediation queue
items.command: pnpm run report:buyer-evidence-readiness && pnpm run report:launch-evidence-manifest
items.evidenceBoundary: The buyer evidence remediation queue maps non-pass buyer hard-gate rows for accepted buyer evidence, reviewer evidence, commercial signal, retained artifacts, and 95% validation, but it does not contact buyers. It does not create accepted evidence, move confidence, attach artifacts, validate 95%, or claim buyer acceptance.
items.nextAction: Collect real anonymized accepted buyer rows, reviewer notes, commercial signal, and retained redacted artifacts, then rerun validate:pilot-evidence --require-95 before changing buyer confidence claims.

items.label: Supabase connector advisors
items.command: Supabase MCP security/performance advisors for qnymbecjgeaoxsfphrti

It does not grant production approval or create launch readiness, and it does not create advisor clearance.

items.label: Supabase advisor remediation queue

It does not create or claim advisor clearance.
